programme.desc: A loner falls for a rebel who fights for what she believes in.

programme.title: The Adventures of Pureza: Queen of the Riles

programme.desc: Twin sisters Kimmy and Dora accept proposals from their boyfriends and strange things begin to happen to the men and their father.

programme.title: Mario Sandoval: Kahit Ako'y Lupa
programme.desc: Mario's dreams of getting his family out of squalor and poverty are shattered when his co-workers expose his dirty past. Furious, he sets out to take revenge on them.

programme.title: Iisa pa lamang
programme.desc: Arman is forced to choose between two women he loves, one from a decent family and the other being a high-class escort.

programme.title: Buy Now, Die Later
programme.desc: The proprietor of a curio shop sells unusual items related to the five senses, sight, hearing, smell, touch and taste, which change the lives of five people who buy them.

programme.title: Sukob
programme.desc: A Filipino couple working overseas return to their hometown to get married. But a deadly curse follows the couple, based on the superstition that marriage should not take place within a year of the death of an immediate relative.

programme.desc: A young man with superpowers emerges, astonishing the city as he tackles crime and corruption. But some sense a tyrant's rise.

programme.title: Ang tange kong pag-Ibig
programme.desc: A woman hires an investigator to tail her cheating husband. However, the detective soon falls in love with his target's lover, a florist who inadvertently becomes the target of a crime syndicate.

programme.desc: George joins a meditation group led by Carlos the Curandero, a spiritual healer whose mantra is "let it go," however, Mayan worries her dad is letting go of too much, including their living room furniture; a burnout threatens to move next door.

programme.title: Lopez vs Lopez S2
programme.desc: As part of Alcoholics Anonymous, George makes amends with everyone except Oscar, who seeks an apology at a football game, but a run-in with Marshawn Lynch fumbles the plan; Mayan and Quinten try to spark Rosie's love life but end up getting burned.

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: The chefs head to the mountains, a few hours outside of Los Angeles to go to Summer Camp where they are challenged to an outdoor grilling Quickfire for Padma and “Top Chef” Kentucky winner Kelsey Barnard Clark. Before the sun rises, the chefs get to work on an upscale brunch buffet for 200 moms vacationing at the camp using a very limited stock pantry. It’ll take more than s’mores and a round of kumbayas to impress the moms, the judges Tom, Padma and Gail, and guest judge “Top Chef” Charleston Winner Brooke Williamson.

programme.desc: Adventures with music superstar Sunny Bridges and his class.

programme.title: An American Girl: Chrissa Stands Strong
programme.desc: When Chrissa moves to a new school in the middle of the year, she is greeted by the girls in her fourth-grade class with teasing and tricks.

programme.desc: After stumbling upon a cute cat-dog-rabbit creature hybrid, or 'Cadobbit', Ben ignores Grandpa Max's advice and sneaks the animal onto the Rustbucket, but is soon in over his head as it turns on him.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: Aboard the SS Pettigrew on its final voyage, Ben must battle seasickness as well as Steam Smythe, who looks to use his mechanical creatures to sink the steamship's modern replacement.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: With new Omni-Enhancements in tow, Ben plans on saving a town from a sudden mudslide, but his heroics are short-lived once Vilgax appears to warn him about the Omnitrix's mysterious new alien.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: After discovering that Vilgax has joined forces with the Weatherheads, Ben must not only overcome his doubts, but must also fully embrace his new powers if he is to beat his foes.

programme.desc: When the bears' love of food trucks and viral videos gets out of hand, the menacing Agent Trout from the National Wildlife Control pledges to restore the 'natural order' by separating them forever.

programme.title: Bad News Bears
programme.desc: A hot-headed baseball coach finds his work cut out when he takes upon a new coaching assignment with a team that is way below par.

programme.title: Bel-Air S2
programme.desc: When Ashley’s favorite teacher is fired, Will goes to great lengths to help her out and leaves Carlton in an uncomfortable position.

programme.title: Superman
programme.desc: A Superman who's driven by compassion and an inherent belief in the goodness of humankind.

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: With only six chefs remaining, the challenges get even more difficult, when pastry super-chef Sherry Yard awaits the All Stars for a dreaded dessert Quickfire, made even more impossible when chefs must endure a blindfolded taste test to pick their ingredients. Then Michelin-starred Chefs/Restaurateurs Niki and Carole Lidi-Nakayama demonstrate a traditional Japanese Kaiseki meal, the ultimate in simplicity, restraint and precision. The chefs must make this formidable dinner for not just these Kaiseki masters, but in celebration of the Tokyo games with Olympic medalists Diana Taurasi, Rai Benjamin, Nastia Liukin, Ibtihaj Muhammad, Christian Coleman, Kerri Walsh Jennings and NBC Olympic Primetime Host Mike Tirico. The gold medal meal takes place at the iconic Los Angeles Coliseum with Padma, Tom, Nilou Motamed and Niki & Carole Lidi-Nakayama at the judges table.

programme.title: Around the World with Manu Feildel
programme.desc: Manu arrives in Dubai after London and is quick to dig up as much culinary experience in Dubai so he sets off to the spice souk, fish markets and a local pastry kitchen.

programme.title: The Humboldt Current
programme.desc: In Chile's Torres del Paine melt from snow-covered mountains feeds finger-like fjords as they reach out to the sea to join the current lowering its salinity. Rivers estuaries and wetlands are home to many wading birds and the countless inlets and bays are magnets for rare dolphins and orcas.

programme.title: Dr Karl's How Things Work - Ice Cream
programme.desc: Dr Karl gets the scoop on how two of our most popular ice creams are made. Australians each devour around 18 litres of ice cream a year, making us the third largest population of ice cream eaters on the planet.

programme.title: Restoration Australia - King Island, TAS

This documentary follows their journey from the first time they strapped on skis to the brink of Olympic qualification. Faiz and Morgan invite viewers into their world, sharing the challenges, sacrifices, and triumphs that define their pursuit of an unlikely dream.

programme.title: Border Security: America's Front Line S2 - EP 19
programme.desc: Constantly on the lookout for weapons, illegal travellers, and contraband, Border Security: America's Front Line follows the work of US Customs and Border Protection agents and officers as they screen travellers, inspect cargo, and secure the longest border in the world.

programme.title: Alexander Armstrong in Sri Lanka - EP 1
programme.desc: Sri Lanka has a tumultuous past - civil wars, natural disasters and the economic crisis of 2022 that saw 700,000 people storm the President's home. As the country reopens to tourists, Alexander Armstrong speeds across the Indian Ocean to learn more about the land of serendipity'.

programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights - EP 63

programme.title: White Cat Legend - EP 11 大理寺少卿游
programme.desc: The story is set in the divine capital under the rule of the Empress. During a grand night banquet at the Tang Palace, Li Bing, who is favored by the Empress, is appointed as the Vice Minister of the Ministry of Justice. In the Ministry of Justice, Chen Shi, Wang Qi, Alibaba, Cui Bei, and Sun Bao, under the leadership of the new Vice Minister, the White Cat Li Bing, work together to clear the layers of mystery surrounding the divine capital.

programme.title: Adventure With Johnny - EP 3 溢起趣打卡
programme.desc: In this brand-new travel programme, host Marco Liao travels across three continent, Europe, Asia, and Africa, and filmed from four countries: India, Turkey, Indonesia, and Tunisia, witnessing the charm of world heritage and Islamic culture, and experiencing the life of these beautiful cultures.

programme.title: The Ultimatum - EP 29 双子星
programme.desc: Zheng Wen Yu was pregnant when she was taken advantage of by her boss Ye Song Nian, the CEO of Phoenix Corporation. Both Wen Yu and Song Nian's wife gave birth to daughters in the same hospital. As fate will have it, the hospital made a mistake and swapped the babies. Because Wen Yu's daughter was diagnosed with congenital heart disease, she kept silent about the mistake so that her daughter can receive the best medical care with Song Nian's wealth.

programme.title: The Ultimatum - EP 30 双子星

programme.desc: Patients entrust their health and lives to doctors, but doctors are human too, how do they learn to shoulder the weight of these lives? Journey with four young aspiring junior doctors into our first medical longform drama, where they learn to grow with senior specialists, as they face life and death and overcome challenges on their way to become professional doctors...

programme.title: Kid U Not - EP 12 孩是老的辣
programme.desc: Elated at returning to their true form, Manle and Yutong return to their families while Chris gets stuck with Alex. Their joy doesn’t last. This is only a small reward for their efforts and they return to their aged form the next day. While helping the trio, Manxin and Alex start developing feelings for each other. Meanwhile, the trio slowly fall into Cheh Nam’s trap.

programme.title: Talk of The Town - EP 31 狮城热话
programme.desc: A half-hour talk-show segment in Hello Singapore which brings together diverse voices and expert opinions to thought-provoking discussions on wide range of issues. Incorporating online polls which gather public opinions, the segment creates a space that allows for multi viewpoints in the studio from Monday to Friday.

programme.title: Heroes in White - EP 15 侠医
programme.desc: Yingchen accidentally breaks a valuable medicinal pot and feels deeply guilty, spending the night trying to learn how to repair it. Weimin joins her in fixing the pot, and the experience brings them closer together.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 290
programme.desc: One click folds or unfolds the AURA X. Lightweight, portable, and airline-approved, it’s safe, stylish, and travel-ready. iF Design Award 2024 winner—effortless mobility anytime, anywhere.

Tupperware 冷冻保鲜 5 件套让备餐和长期储存变得便捷，有效锁住食物的新鲜度。作为 Tupperware 畅销第一的冷冻容器，它采用快速冷冻设计与柔韧材质，冷冻后轻松脱模。多种尺寸组合，能轻松满足各种冷冻储存的需求。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Nature's Farm® Krill Oil 180s
programme.desc: Nature’s Farm Krill Oil is made with SUPERBA 2™ krill oil, one of the most researched krill oils, backed by over 130 clinical trials. It is pure, sustainable, and traceable from catch to capsule. Rich in omega-3s, astaxanthin, phospholipids, and choline, it supports heart, brain, liver, eye, skin, and joint health. Nature's Farm来自南极的磷虾油，富含优质Omega-3脂肪酸和虾红素, 有助于维持胆固醇水平、维护心 脏、大脑和关节健康！ 人体对磷虾油的吸收率更高，没有难闻的鱼腥味，软胶囊更容易吞服，一天2颗有助于维护整体健康！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Acerpure Water Purifier + Air Fryer
programme.desc: Upgrade your kitchen with the Acerpure Aqua WP5 Water Purifier and 2-in-1 Flip Air Fryer—the ultimate duo for convenience and health. Enjoy instant 99°C hot and 5°C cold water, perfectly filtered with 5-in-1 RO & double UV sterilization, while the 2-in-1 Flip Air Fryer lets you air fry, grill, or make soup with a quick 180° flip. Both are easy to use, safe, and efficient—smarter cooking and cleaner drinking water, all in one kitchen setup. 厨房必备组合：Acerpure Aqua WP5 滤净水器搭配2合1翻转气炸锅，理想组合，健康又方便。随时享用 99°C 热水 / 5°C 冷水，水质纯净安全（5合1 RO+双重UV杀菌）；翻转气炸锅可轻松实现 空气炸、烤肉、煮汤。操作简单、安全高效，干净饮水与轻松烹饪，一台搞定厨房大小事！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Morries 6.5L Yuan Yang Hot Pot + 5” Retro Fan Bundle
programme.desc: Enjoy hotpot with 2 different soup bases with the Morries Yuan Yang hot pot. Its 2200W high power ensures rapid boiling, bringing 2L of water to boil in just 9 minutes. With its innovative G-type dual-loop heating tube, enjoy fast and even heat distribution for your hotpot meals at home. Get yours now and experience cool breezes with a retro fan while you enjoy a hotpot meal with your loved ones. Morries鸳鸯锅让你实现火锅自由！创新G型双环加热管设计，让热能分布均匀。鸳鸯锅设计，可同时享用两种不同汤底，也可以一边烤肉，一边煮汤。2200W高功率确保快速沸腾，左右独立温控系统，让您精准调节加热温度。套组附带可调节的无线桌面风扇。

Its tasteless, odorless powder blends effortlessly into any food or drink, making it perfect for daily joint care, especially for those who prefer not to take pills. Q’SAI 膝之助胶原蛋白粉 QSAI 护膝胶原蛋白粉，截至2024年1月累计销量已超过5000万盒，富含高吸收性的胶原蛋白肽、玻尿酸和软骨素，有助滋养关节和软骨、缓解关节疼痛。其无味无臭的粉末状配方，可轻松加入任何食物或饮料中服用，是日常关节护理的理想之选，尤其适合那些不想服用药片的人士。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - HOTO Electric Spin Scrubber

Equipped with a high speed motor and built in rechargeable battery, it removes grease, stains and buildup from sinks, stovetops and countertops effortlessly. 一款无线高扭矩清洁器，为轻松，深层清洁而设计。它可伸缩手柄与6种可替换刷头，轻松清洁地板，瓷砖，浴缸及狭小角落。简约奢华设计，适合每个人使用。

It helps to boost blood circulation, concentration, and enhance mental clarity, and helps relieve cold and numb hands and feet caused by poor blood circulation. 更高含量活性银杏，有助于提升您的思维和血液循环 Thomson Circulon 125 – 125 毫克高含量活性银杏精华，采用日本尖端活性技术，提升吸收率。它有助于促进血液循环、集中注意力、提升思维清晰度。有助于缓解因血液循环不良而产生的手脚冰冷麻痹等状况。
